title: dryopteris hirsuta
intro: Dryopteris hirsuta, also known as the hairy male fern, is a species of flowering plant in the family Dryopteridaceae. It is native to the Himalayan region and is known for its medicinal properties, particularly in its ability to aid in the treatment of various health issues. The plant has been traditionally used to treat conditions such as fever, rheumatism, and digestive issues, due to its antiseptic and anti-inflammatory properties. The hairy male fern can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, which are often used to alleviate symptoms and promote overall well-being.
